content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''192''''' was a group of three [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|Assassin-class corvettes]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. They were scheduled to be repaired at [[Depot XLS]], but were attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] intending to destroy all the [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] while they were at their weakest condition.

==Behind the scenes==
Whether or not ''192'' gets destroyed depends on the player's actions.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}

[[Category:CR92a Assassin-class corvettes|*]]
